quotes.text:
For the sake of the living,
we must part with the dead
quotes.author: Renoir

quotes.text:
If saving you means losing you...
...then so be it
quotes.author: Renoir

quotes.text:
Now I feel a little less lost
'Cause at least, we're lost together
quotes.author: Gustave

quotes.text:
I envy them, those who can't see
Those who know not, that they are not
quotes.author: Alicia

quotes.text:
Men trip not on mountains,
They stumble upon stones
quotes.author: Esquie

quotes.text:
Between the bars of their prison
In the shadow of the monolith
quotes.author: Renoir

quotes.text:
What hurts more are the memories unmade.
The conversations we’ll never have, the time we’ll never spend.
quotes.author: Aline

quotes.text:
We all need masks.
But how we use them, hm...
quotes.author: Mask Keeper

quotes.text: An act of love. For he does love her
quotes.author: Alicia

quotes.text:
If you could grow old,
Would you... find a reason to smile?
quotes.author: Maelle

quotes.text: But this is a kindness, not a cruelty
quotes.author: Renoir
